title: Adding Buttons to the Dashboard
excerpt: Working with various clients, it would be nice to have an interactive dashboard view with simple buttons or widget that enable/disable specific settings to show data relevant to the client.  Currently having to create a …

posts.author: pjimenez (Pedro Jimenez)
posts.cookedHtml: Working with various clients, it would be nice to have an interactive dashboard view with simple buttons or widget that enable/disable specific settings to show data relevant to the client. Currently having to create a new Dashboard for every client to show data relevant to them.
